race.description: Ultra Lubricants Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Hcp
race.comment: MEDDLESOME (9) hasn't won for 81 weeks but she continues to tease. Settled handy then was in for the fight but found one better last start in a Class 1 over this distance at Armidale. Yet to miss the frame in five runs at 1400m. Blinkers back on today could be the catalyst for a return to the winner's circle. CHESTIME (3) made it two wins from her last three runs when she easily took out a similar race to this at Scone three weeks ago. Unbeaten at Gunnedah so despite a wide draw and 61.5kgs she is right in the spotlight. RAINBOW BLESSING (6) caught the eye first-up over 1100m then was too bad to be true in CHESTIME's race at Scone recently. Can bounce back without surprising. LESGO DON (5) recorded a confidence boosting win at Warialda last start. Five-time winner at the trip so cannot be underestimated. HINTO (7) finds a slightly easier race today and can improve on a plain effort last time.
